free_text: C-13(3-Li-6,t)O-16 reaction in the 20-32 MeV incident
energy range.
The Saclay FN tandem Van de Graaff.
Self-supporting C-13 targets, enriched to 80% and
of thicknesses in the range from 80 to 200-mug/cm**2 ,
was used.
HF and EFR-DWBA analysis.
Triton energy spectrum from the C-13(Li-6,t)O-16
reaction at E(Li-6)=25 MeV was observed.
Delta-E-E telescopes made of two silicon
detectors.
